description_long: This kiosk features a compact, rectangular structure with a sturdy base and a sloped, blue-tiled roof supported by a visible metal frame. The front side is open, providing access to a wooden platform and a partially enclosed service area, while the rear and sides are solid panels for privacy and security. The roof extends beyond the main structure, offering some shelter to the front area. Adjacent to the kiosk is a freestanding wall with printed informational posters and signage, likely for advertising or public information. The kiosk's materials include metal framing, wood flooring, opaque wall panels, and a tiled roof, giving it a modern yet utilitarian appearance. The overall design is functional, suitable for use as a small retail or service booth in urban environments.
description: A modern, compact kiosk with a blue sloped roof, open front, and adjacent signage wall. Features metal framing, wood flooring, and solid side panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open service area, wooden platform, and adjacent wall with posters and signage.
description_view_1: Rear-side angle highlighting the blue sloped roof, solid rear panels, and partial view of the signage wall.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the solid rear and side panels, with the roof and base clearly visible; signage wall is mostly blank from this angle.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the blank side of the signage wall and the kiosk's open front and roof structure.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign and posters, mounted on adjacent wall panel, includes graphics and text
attribute_roof_design: sloped, single-pitch roof with blue ceramic tiles and metal frame, slight overhang at front
